name: The Village Witch: Kai Brafe'ha
description:
馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼
鉁煣欚煪勨湪
馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼

A group of witches has graduated from the Academy for Metaphysical Mysteries, and now need to find their places as the village witch somewhere in Bedazzland. Kai is a fresh-faced member of the graduating class, ready to become an indispensible helper of society.

馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼
馃尓馃槇馃枻馃尓
馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼

鈼絓nKai is non-binary witch whose magical specialties鈥擠eath and Chaos鈥攕eem to have chosen them, rather than the other way around. Kai wants to use their magick for good, but those fields often lead down the path of the wicked witch or evil sorcerer; and for this reason, many people distrust such witches.
鈼絓n
馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼
鉂擆煋嗮煆犫潛
馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼

鈼解椊鈼解椊鈼解椊
Kai has one year to find the village where they belong and want to call home. Will they find acceptance before the year runs out, or will they become the lone evil magickan destined to destroy the society they want to help?
鈼解椊鈼解椊鈼解椊

馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼

馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼馃敼

鈼絓nThis is an online pen-and-paper journaling RPG, based on the game "Village Witch" and the expansion "Village Witch Post", by Eliot Crow. Please support the game designer if this roleplay sounds like fun!
